title: The Dulling - A Final Challenge
description: Adds an eldritch threat to your world, with Bosses, Dimensions, Magic, & more!
body:
THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB

It has devoured countless worlds, and now its gaze is upon yours. Will you let it take everything from you?

The Dulling is a post-Vanilla endgame Incursion built to act as a final challenge for an already established world.

Once activated, a hostile Incursion begins spreading across your world, evolving over time and escalating into a Solar Eclipse that triggers a Global Snowstorm (if my mixins don't fucking break again). The Overworld is not their only target; the Dull Church can invade any dimension, even from other mods.



They try to estimate where your base is located and send units to invade your home.

They use Veils that can latch onto almost any mob and take control of them.

They learn by analyzing attributes, observing behavioral patterns, remembering past battles and behaviors, and with this info they determine the best strategy to defeat a target. 

They steal biomass from infection mods and use it to augment themselves.

They take everything from you.

The mod adds:
- 14 boss battles and counting.
- 100+ unique enemies and counting.

- Not just one "infection", but TWO. The second is a birch-themed counter-infection known as "The Burgeoning" that can awaken and help fight the Dulling.

- A Magic System with 30+ unique magic weapons and 8 magic armors.
- 2 dimensions constantly receiving more features, with a total of 7 new biomes, along with a new biome in the Nether just for fun (unfortunately, it is incompatible with most Nether biome mods at the moment).
- Multiple armor sets, toolsets, weapons, enchantments, and progression systems.

- Ancient Enchantments, a powerful class of enchantments that exist as far stronger versions of vanilla enchantments. They have a unique method of acquisition accessible in the late game, and there exists an Ancient Enchantment for every vanilla enchantment. 

To start the Incursion, go to 0, 0, 0, and destroy the Sacreligious Core that keeps your world safe.

For a good source of information on the Dulling and other mods, consult this YouTube channel:

https://www.youtube.com/@SculkedAura



Credits:

JC, Dimensional Traveler for the majority of entity animations, along with some textures and models.

Slasher for the Burgeoning model and its texture, among other models and textures.

Lemon AKA rustycleaver for some entity animations and concept art of the Praefectus.

WhackyAxis for some textures and the Driller model and animations.

Andromeda for voice acting The Adapticon.

Moonfish for the initial concept of the Burgeoning among others.

SculkedAura for gallery images.
